title: Poa latifolia
taxonomy: Poa latifolia belongs to the family Poaceae and is a species of grass. It is a perennial plant that is widely distributed in various parts of the world. Poa latifolia is a member of the genus Poa, which includes many other species of grass. The genus Poa is further classified under the subfamily Pooideae, which is a large and diverse group of grasses. Poa latifolia is also known to be a part of the order Poales, a group that includes various types of grasses and sedges.
